notes.text: Food and property portfolio grids will be refactored to a UNIFORM, aligned grid (not masonry). Every thumbnail is an equal 3:4 PORTRAIT tile, center-cropped (object-fit:cover). User initially said 4:3 but switched to 3:4 to better accommodate portrait source images. Applies to all images regardless of original orientation.

The per-restaurant masonry config system (buildColumns, columnLayout, forcedRatio, photoOverrides in galleryColumns) is to be refactored away / replaced as part of this change. Treat as a layout refactor.
Lightbox uncropped full-image reveal on click must be preserved (already exists in GalleryGrid.tsx). Only the grid thumbnail layout changes.

payload.context: Discuss: grid refactor decision confirmed by user.
